# ona Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "ona" {
  api_key  = var.ona_api_key   # or set GITPOD_API_KEY env var
  base_url = var.ona_base_url  # optional, defaults to https://app.gitpod.io/api
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key. Falls back to `GITPOD_API_KEY` env var.
- `base_url` (String) API base URL. Falls back to `GITPOD_BASE_URL` env var. Defaults to `https://app.gitpod.io/api`.
